product.name: Wharfedale Diamond 9.1 Bookshelf Speakers (Pair) Walnut
product.description:
Key features:
WhatHiFi 5-Star bookshelf speakers Exceptional value for money with advanced features for the price point Curved braced cabinets help to eliminate vibrations and dissipate standing waves Gold-plated bi-wire connection separates high and low frequencies for enhanced clarity Dual reflex ports enhance overall bass response and clarity
5-year warranty & 30-day money-back guarantee included
Overview: The Wharfedale Diamond 9.1 Bookshelf Speakers are clear and precise with unmatched sound reproduction at their level. They boast curved braced cabinets that not only allude to the premium aesthetic qualities of higher-priced speakers but also help to reduce unwanted cabinet vibrations and dissipate derogatory standing waves that can negatively affect your sound. The five-inch Kevlar mid/bass driver and one-inch textile tweeter work effortlessly together offering sparkling highs and full controlled lows revealing details in your favourite tracks that may have previously gone unheard. The gold-plated bi-wireable binding posts a trait usually only found at higher price ranges ensure complete versatility in your set-up and will benefit those who aim to achieve a precise and clean sound where high and low frequencies blend harmoniously without a fight for air space.
product.category: Sound & Vision|Home Audio & HiFi Separates|Speakers & Subwoofers

product.name: Cello C50WS4K 50" inch Smart WiFi WebOS 4K Ultra HD TV Freeview Play FRAMELESS
product.description:
50″ Smart WebOS 4K Ultra HD TV with Freeview Play and Frameless Bezel
50” 4K Ultra HD LED TV LG’s Smart operating system, WebOS Hub built-in Download apps through the web browser Freeview HD by Aerial & also a Satellite tuner built-in with Freesat Bluetooth connectivity (easily add a Bluetooth soundbar) Freeview Play with 100 channels and 20,000 hours of free on-demand content 3 x HDMI inputs for your external devices and consoles Can be wall mounted (200mm x 100mm bracket & 4 pcs M5 X8 not included)
The built-in Smart platform, developed by LG, allows you to browse the web and download all your favourite entertainment apps, so you can stream directly to the TV. From Netflix, Prime Video and Disney Plus to YouTube and catch-up apps like BBC iPlayer and ITVx, a world of entertainment awaits.
With Freeview Play you can watch an impressive 60,000+ hours of TV and over 1,500 boxsets, across your favourite on-demand players. All for free.
With the built-in Bluetooth connectivity, you can add a Bluetooth soundbar to the TV. This means cinema sound can be enjoyed without the need for untidy cables. The built-in satellite tuner with Freesat provides access to over 170 channels with 100% channel coverage on a subscription-free basis. Plus, you’ll find your favourite on-demand players all in one place. You will just need to purchase and install your own satellite dish/cabling. The ultimate flat-screen TV with its super-slim bezel and lightweight design is ideal for wall mounting and easy maneuverability
Specification Screen Size 50″ Freeview Play Yes DVD Player No USB Yes – playback only Contrast Ratio 5000:1 Brightness 250 Max Resolution 3840 x 2160 Speakers 2 x 8W Smart Yes Max Power 120W Energy Rating ‘G – 71 watts on working and 0.5 watt standby power consumption HDMI 3 Inputs RF Antenna, HDMI X3, CVBS, USB x 2, RJ45 Outputs Digital Audio Out, Earphone Out VESA 200mm x 100mm Dimension w/stand W 1110 x H 733 x D 268 mm Dimensions w/o stand W 1110 x H 644 x D 34 mm Weight 9.1kg
product.category: Sound & Vision|TVs

product.name: Coffee Machine Espresso Machine Coffee Maker Cappuccino Milk Frother 20 Bar 1.8L
product.description: ✅ 20Bar High-Pressure Extraction Equipped with a professional high-pressure water pump, it delivers a stable 20Bar extraction pressure to instantly penetrate coffee grounds, fully releasing the aroma and oils of coffee beans. It easily restoring the rich flavor of authentic espresso—every sip rivals the quality of specialty café drinks. ✅ 1.8L Large-Capacity Removable Water Tank No need for frequent refills; a full tank can make multiple cups for the whole family, easily handling daily use and small gatherings. The semi-transparent design lets you check water levels at a glance, and the detachable structure, paired with a separate drip tray, makes refilling and cleaning a breeze—saving time and effort. ✅ Food-Grade Stainless Steel Manufacturing The body and core contact parts are made of food-grade stainless steel, which is corrosion-resistant, high-temperature resistant, and durable. It eliminates residual odors, ensuring every cup of coffee is pure and safe, balancing premium texture with practicality. 🛠️ All-Inclusive Accessories · Unlock Diverse Coffee Experiences The machine comes with a complete set of professional accessories, so you can start your home barista journey right out of the box. It balances professionalism and convenience to suit ☕ Scenario Adaptation · Perfect for Your Daily Moments 🌅 Morning Wake-Up: One-tap espresso, paired with milk for an energizing latte to chase away drowsiness and kickstart a productive day. ☕ Afternoon Relaxation: Brew a cup of freshly ground coffee with dessert, enjoying a moment of peaceful solitude and elevating your at-home ritual. 🥂 Friend Gatherings: Quick double-cup brewing and a variety of milk-based drinks let you host a cozy coffee party at home. 💼 Office Energy Boost: Fast capsule brewing eliminates waiting time, providing timely energy to enhance work efficiency. 📌 Product Specifications Extraction Pressure: 20Bar high-pressure extraction Water Tank Capacity: 1.8L large-capacity removable water tank
product.category: Home, Furniture & DIY|Appliances|Coffee, Tea & Espresso Makers|Espresso & Cappuccino Machines

product.name: 11.5" Portable DVD Player with 9.5" Large HD Swivel Screen High Volume Speaker
product.description:
About this item 👨‍👩‍👧【Portable and Magical】-- Compact design makes it easy to carry out with you. Take it on your road trip and get double surprises both on and off the screen. portable DVD player can be easily swiveled as a tablet and mounted to the car headrest, brings tons of fun for your journey. 👨‍👩‍👧【5 Hrs Battery Life】-- Upgraded battery capacity to 2500mAh, you and your family can watch 1-2 movies without any worries. Our portable DVD player for car provide a certificated AC power adapter and car charger in the package, no more worries about the battery dying out when you are out. 👨‍👩‍👧【Protective and Gorgeous Screen】-- portable DVD player for kids adopts the HD Eye-protective Screen, and refuses the recycled screen, aiming at alleviating eye fatigue caused by the long use, more comfortable and protective screen for your kids’ eyes. 👨‍👩‍👧【All Regions & Multi Formats】-- Supports CD,DVD,VCD,SVCD,CD±R/±RW,DVD±R/±RW from all region (Blu-ray and pirated discs are not supported); DVD player portable also support multi-media files via USB and SD Card (16-32GB), such as VOB, AVI, MPEG, MP3, WMA, JPEG. 👨‍👩‍👧【Dual Speakers & Clear Sound】-- Portable dvd player with screen equipped with two high-power speakers, which makes the volume louder. There is a 3.5mm earphone jack on the right side of the portable dvd players so that you can get a concentrated and clearer sound for your private viewing. 👨‍👩‍👧【Easy Operation & Seamless Viewing】-- DVD player has a simple operating system and a convenient remote control, making it an ideal companion for the kids and elderly. Never miss out on exciting plots, the Break-point memory function can ensure seamless connection of the plot. 👨‍👩‍👧【Premium Service & Quick Response】-- We are committed to providing the best after-sales service to our customers. If you have any questions, concerns, or issues with the your device, we are here to help you 24 hours a day.
★Eye-protection LCD screen★: DVD player provide a 800*480 Swivel Screen with 270 degrees rotation and 180 degrees flip. The portable player can be swiveled as a tablet to attache to the car backseat to play. ★Super High Battery★: Upgrade battery capacity to 2 times as the original ones, ensures the 5 hours play time. Not enough? Free car charger provided in the package. ★Resume Play★: Support break-point memory function, make it possible to start from where you left at last time, no need to start again. ★Game Player★: This DVD player is more than a DVD player, we provide a free game controller in our package, kids also can use this to play 180 kinds of retro games, such as super Mario etc. Note: customer need do download game cd by yourself. ★Multi-Media★: Directly play in formats: CD, DVD, CD-R/RW, DVD-R/+R, DVD+RW/-RW, VCD, SVCD; USB and SD Card supported: MP3/WMA/WAV, JPEG, MPEG2/AVI, TXT.
The new version of portable DVD player. 3 years in portable DVD player make us understand your needs better and make prodcuts more better.
Your Home Cinema always with You: Our Portable DVD Player has a built-in USB port that allows you to enjoy your favorite movies while travelling, camping, sightseeing,you can also copy your CD files to USB or SD card. Improved battery: Improved 2000mAh Lithium battery extend the play time to 5 hours,even the adapter was left at home,do not need to worry about losing battery power whilst watching a movie.
Break Point memory: Break Point memory function make it possible to start from where you end at last time. Sync to your TV Screen: With the included AV cable, it's available to transmit the screen from DVD player to your TV to enjoy a bigger and clearer screen. Fantastic Swivel Screen: portable DVD player with 9.5 inch 270° rotation and 180° flip screen make it possible to attach to the car headrest and make you enjoy your time when you are on boring road trip.
Package Including: 1x Portable DVD player 1x AV cable 1x Remote controller 1x Power adapter 1x Car charger 1x User manual
product.category: Sound & Vision|DVD, Blu-ray & Home Cinema|DVD & Blu-ray Players

product.name: 2 Packs 6AH For Makita 18V Battery Li-Ion BL1830 BL1850 BL1840 BL1860B LXT400
product.category: Home, Furniture & DIY|DIY Tools & Workshop Equipment|Power Tool & Air Tool Accessories|Power Tool Batteries

product.name: Bluetooth FM Transmitter Car Kit MP3 Player USB Charger Handsfree Adapter UK
product.description:
Upgrade your driving experience with this multifunctional Car Charger Bluetooth adapter. Combining hands-free calling, music streaming, and rapid charging, it’s the perfect companion for every journey. Designed with Fast Charger BT 5.0 technology, it delivers high-speed charging while keeping your devices connected safely.
⭐ Key Features Bluetooth 5.0 Connectivity: Stable, fast pairing with smartphones for calls, music, and navigation audio. FM Transmitter Function: Stream your favorite playlists directly to your car stereo via FM radio. Dual USB Fast Charging Ports: Supports rapid charging for multiple devices simultaneously. MP3 Player Support: Play music from USB drives or SD cards effortlessly. Hands-Free Calling: Clear audio with built-in microphone ensures safe driving. Compact & Universal Design: Fits all standard car cigarette lighter sockets and works with most vehicles.
📊 Technical Specs Bluetooth Version: 5.0 Input: DC 12-24V Output: 5V/2.4A per USB port Frequency Range: 87.5–108MHz Compatible Formats: MP3/WMA/WAV LED Display: Shows FM frequency and device info
💡 Benefits Charge your phone and other devices quickly with Fast Charger BT 5.0 technology. Enjoy seamless music streaming without tangled wires. Stay safe with hands-free calling while driving. Compact design keeps your dashboard neat and organized.
🎯 Ideal For Daily commuters who need fast device charging and music on the go. Road trips and long drives requiring hands-free calls and entertainment. Anyone who wants to upgrade an older car stereo to Bluetooth functionality. Drivers with multiple devices needing simultaneous fast charging.
🌐 Vast Applications Cars, SUVs, trucks, and other vehicles with cigarette lighter sockets. Listening to music or podcasts from smartphones, USB drives, or SD cards. Hands-free calls during work commutes, rideshare driving, or family trips. Charging smartphones, tablets, GPS devices, power banks, and other USB devices. Enhancing older car stereos with FM broadcasting and Bluetooth connectivity.
product.category:
Electronics
Portable Audio & Headphones Portable Audio Accessories Transmitters

product.name: Mini Pocket Umbrella Folding Compact Rain Windproof Anti UV 5 Folding Travel UK
product.description:
Stay protected in every season with this sleek and ultra-portable Mini Pocket Compact Fold Umbrella. Designed for modern lifestyles, it combines Rain Windproof durability with Anti UV protection, making it the perfect everyday travel essential.
⭐ Key Features 🌧 Rain Windproof Design – Strong frame for reliable performance in wind & rain ☀️ Anti UV Protection – Helps block harmful sun rays on hot days 👜 Ultra Compact & Pocket Size – Easy to carry anywhere, anytime ⚡ Quick Open & Fold – Simple, hassle-free operation 🎒 Travel Case Included – Clean and convenient storage 💪 Durable Build – Premium materials for long-term use
📏 Technical Specifications Type: 5-Fold Compact Umbrella Material: Waterproof Fabric + Reinforced Metal Frame Function: Rainproof, Windproof, Anti UV Folded Size: Approx. 15–18 cm Open Diameter: Approx. 90–95 cm Weight: Lightweight & portable Included: Protective Travel Case
🌍 Ideal For 🌧 Rainy Days – Stay dry during sudden showers ☀️ Super Sunny Days – Reliable shade with Anti UV protection 🍂 Autumn & Winter – Handles wet and windy conditions 🌸 Spring Showers – Perfect for unpredictable weather 🌞 Summer Heat – Use as a portable sunshade 🌦 All-Season Use – One umbrella for every condition
🔄 Vast Application of Usage Designed to make your life easier, this umbrella is perfect for:
🚶 Daily Use – Commuting, school runs, office travel 🛍 Shopping Trips – Stay comfortable while out and about ✈️ Travel & Holidays – Compact size fits easily in luggage 🚗 On-the-Go Protection – Keep in your car or bag for emergencies 🎉 Outdoor Events – Festivals, sports days, gatherings 🏕 Outdoor Activities – Walking, hiking, camping 👨‍👩‍👧 For Everyone – Suitable for men, women, and kids 👉 No confusion, no hassle — one simple solution for all your weather needs
🎯 Why Choose This Umbrella? ✔ Dual-purpose Rain Windproof & Anti UV protection ✔ Compact, lightweight, and easy to carry ✔ Reliable in all weather conditions ✔ Practical design for everyday convenience
🚀 Benefits You’ll Love Stay dry and protected anytime, anywhere Enjoy peace of mind with all-in-one weather protection Carry effortlessly without bulk Dependable performance you can trust
product.category: Fashion Women Women's Accessories Umbrellas

product.name: Bike Seat Cover Soft Gel Saddle Bicycle Padded Cushioned Extra Comfort UK
product.description:
Soft Gel Bike Seat Cover Padded Cushion Saddle – Universal Fit for Maximum Comfort 🚴 Upgrade your cycling experience with this premium Soft Gel Bike Seat Cover, designed to deliver exceptional Padded Comfort on every ride. Whether commuting, exercising, or riding long distances, enjoy a smoother, pain-free journey.
⭐ Key Features Soft Gel Padding – Advanced cushioning absorbs shock and reduces pressure Padded Comfort Design – Extra-thick padding for long rides Secure Anti-Slip Fit – Non-slip base with adjustable drawstring Breathable Design – Airflow channel reduces heat and moisture Water-Resistant – Protects from sweat and light rain Universal Fit – Fits most standard bike saddles 💎 Premium Quality & Material High-grade soft gel with high-density memory foam Premium Lycra fabric – breathable and stretchable Reinforced stitching for durability Anti-slip textured base for stability Maintains shape after long-term use 📐 Technical Specifications Material: Soft Gel + High-Density Foam + Lycra Fabric Size: Approx. 27.5 x 17 cm Weight: Lightweight & portable Compatibility: Fits most bike saddles Installation: Easy slip-on with drawstring 🎯 Ideal For Daily commuters and city cyclists Long-distance and endurance riders Indoor cycling and spin classes Mountain and road biking Beginners needing extra comfort 🌍 Vast Applications Road bikes – long-distance comfort Mountain bikes – shock absorption City bikes – daily commuting Exercise bikes – home workouts Hybrid bikes – mixed terrain Leisure cycling – casual rides Travel & touring – portable comfort ✅ Benefits Ride longer without discomfort Reduces pressure on sensitive areas Improves performance and endurance Quick installation – no tools needed
product.category:
Sports, Hobbies & Leisure
Cycling Bike Accessories Saddle Covers

product.name: Anti Mosquito Insect & Bug Repellent Bracelet Bands Silicone Wristband 1- 20 PK
product.description: ⭐ Key Features Effective Mosquito Protection – Helps repel mosquitoes and insects naturally Safe & DEET-Free – Infused with natural plant-based essential oils Adjustable & Flexible Fit – Comfortable silicone design for adults and children Long-Lasting Use – Provides extended protection for hours Portable & Easy – Wear on wrist, ankle, or attach anywhere Multiple Colors – Fun and vibrant options Value Packs – Available in 1–20 PCS options 📊 Technical Specifications Material: High-quality silicone Active Ingredients: Natural essential oils (citronella, eucalyptus, etc.) Size: One-size-fits-most (adjustable) Usage Time: Several hours per band (varies by environment) Application: Wrist, ankle, bags, strollers Pack Options: 1, 5, 10, 15, or 20 pieces ✅ Benefits No sprays, no skin irritation, no mess Family-friendly for kids and adults Lightweight, waterproof, and travel-ready Great alternative to traditional repellents 🎯 Ideal For Camping, hiking, fishing, and outdoor adventures Travel, holidays, and picnics Gardening, BBQs, and sports activities Everyday use at home or school 🌍 Vast Applications of Usage Outdoor: camping, trekking, cycling, beach trips Home & garden: backyard, lawn work, evening relaxation Kids: school, playgrounds, daycare Travel: airports, hotels, tropical destinations Work: fishing, farming, construction, warehouses Pet walks: parks, trails, wooded areas Daily use: shopping, commuting, casual outings 🚚 Free Shipping Fast & reliable delivery Secure packaging for safe arrival No extra charges

product.description: Key Features Perfect Squeeze Technology – Extracts maximum juice with minimal effort Durable Stainless Steel Build – Rust-resistant and long-lasting Ergonomic Handle Design – Comfortable grip for easy squeezing No Seeds, No Mess – Built-in filter keeps juice smooth Easy to Clean – Dishwasher safe and quick rinse cleaning Used for Variety of Fruits – Ideal for lemons, limes, and small oranges 📐 Technical Specifications Material: Premium Stainless Steel Type: Handheld Manual Juicer Color: Silver Size: Compact & portable Weight: Lightweight yet durable Cleaning: Dishwasher safe 💡 Benefits Saves time compared to manual squeezing Extracts more juice with less waste Keeps hands clean and irritation-free Ideal for home, bars, and restaurants Compact for easy storage and travel 🎯 What It Is Ideal For Making fresh lemon and lime juice Preparing cocktails and refreshing drinks Adding flavor to salads, marinades, and dishes Baking desserts and pastries Daily kitchen and professional use 🌍 Vast Applications of Usage Beverages – lemon water, smoothies, iced tea Cooking – seafood, chicken, sauces, vegetables Salads – fresh citrus dressings Baking – cakes, tarts, desserts Bar use – cocktails like margaritas & mojitos Natural cleaning – eco-friendly lemon solutions DIY beauty – skincare and hair remedies Outdoor use – picnics, camping, travel

product.name: 10m Retractable Clothes Reel Double Washing Line Wall Mounted Outdoor
product.description: Key Features 10M Double Washing Line – Provides ample drying space for clothes, towels, and bedding Retractable Design – Extends when needed and neatly retracts to save space Wall Mounted Convenience – Easy to install on walls, fences, or posts Durable & Weather-Resistant – Built to withstand outdoor conditions Secure Locking Mechanism – Keeps the line tight and prevents sagging Compact Storage – Keeps spaces tidy and clutter-free 📊 Technical Specifications Line Length: 10 meters (double line) Type: Retractable Clothes Reel Installation: Wall Mounted Material: High-quality ABS casing + strong line cord Usage: Indoor & Outdoor Color: Varies by stock Mounting Accessories: Included 💡 Benefits Saves space compared to traditional clotheslines Keeps laundry neat and off the ground Perfect for small spaces like balconies and patios Helps reduce indoor moisture Easy to use and maintain 🏡 Ideal For Homes with limited outdoor space Apartments, balconies, and patios Gardens, garages, and laundry rooms Everyday family laundry drying needs 🌍 Vast Applications of Usage Drying clothes, towels, bedsheets, and delicates Indoor drying during rainy seasons Outdoor use in gardens or backyards Camping, caravans, and temporary setups Utility rooms and shared laundry areas

product.name: EMERGENCY HAMMER CAR WINDOW BREAKER SEATBELT CUTTER BREAK GLASS ESCAPE SAFETY UK
product.description:
EMERGENCY HAMMER Car Window Breaker & Seatbelt Cutter – Essential Vehicle Escape Safety Tool (UK Stock)
Be fully prepared for unexpected emergencies with this high‑quality EMERGENCY HAMMER featuring a WINDOW BREAKER & SEATBELT CUTTER. Designed for rapid response, this compact yet durable tool can make a critical difference when seconds matter.
⭐ Key Features ✔ 2-in-1 Emergency Design – Heavy-duty window breaker & seatbelt cutter in one compact tool ✔ Hardened Steel Hammer Head – Instantly shatters side windows in emergency situations ✔ Sharp Concealed Blade – Quickly cuts jammed or locked seatbelts ✔ Non-Slip Anti-Skid Handle – Firm grip for safe and controlled use ✔ High-Visibility Red Body – Easy to locate in stressful situations ✔ Protective Mounting Bracket – Secure and convenient storage within reach ✔ Compact & Lightweight – Fits glove box, door pocket, or centre console
🔧 Technical Specifications Material: High-carbon hardened steel hammer head Handle: Durable ABS with anti-slip grip Blade: Stainless steel concealed safety blade Length: Approx. 17cm Weight: Approx. 130–150g Colour: Red Condition: Brand New Stock Location: UK
🌍 Vast Application of Usage This EMERGENCY HAMMER is suitable for a wide range of vehicles and emergency situations:
🚗 Private cars & family vehicles 🚕 Taxis, Uber & ride-share vehicles 🚚 Vans, trucks & delivery fleets 🚌 Buses & minibuses 🚐 Motorhomes & caravans 🚓 Emergency & service vehicles 🚤 Boats & marine vehicles 🏢 Workplace fleet vehicles 🎒 Travel safety kits & roadside emergency kits Perfect for emergencies involving:
Vehicle submersion in water Electrical or central locking failure Car fires Severe collisions Jammed doors after impact
🛡 Key Benefits ✔ Enables fast escape when doors cannot be opened ✔ Cuts seatbelts instantly to prevent entrapment ✔ Provides peace of mind for drivers and passengers ✔ A small investment for potentially life-saving protection
📦 Package Includes 1 × EMERGENCY HAMMER 1 × Mounting Bracket
product.category:
Motors
Safety & Security Accessories Safety Emergency Tools & Tool Kits

product.name: Hair Trap Shower Bath Plug Hole Waste Catcher Stopper Drain Sink Strainer UK
product.description:
Hair Trap Shower Bath Plug Hole Waste Catcher – Stopper Drain Sink Strainer Keep your drains clean and clog-free with this practical and efficient Plug Hole Waste Catcher. Designed to trap hair, food particles, and debris before they cause blockages, this versatile Stopper Drain Sink Strainer is a must-have for every home.
⭐ Key Features Effective Hair & Debris Trap – Catches hair, soap residue, and waste to prevent clogged drains Dual Function Design – Works as both a Plug Hole Waste Catcher and a Stopper Drain Sink Strainer Universal Fit – Suitable for most sinks, bathtubs, and shower plug holes Durable & Flexible Material – Made from high-quality silicone or TPR for long-lasting use Easy to Clean – Simply remove, rinse, and reuse in seconds Anti-Slip Design – Securely stays in place without shifting during use
📏 Technical Specifications Material: Silicone / TPR (Thermoplastic Rubber) Diameter: Approx. 10–11 cm (fits standard drains) Design: Flat or dome-shaped with raised edges Color Options: Varies (e.g., white, grey, blue, black) Application: Bathroom, kitchen, laundry sinks
✅ Benefits Prevents costly plumbing blockages Maintains smooth water drainage Saves time on cleaning and maintenance Hygienic and reusable solution Ideal for everyday household use
🎯 Ideal For Showers and bathtubs Bathroom and kitchen sinks Laundry tubs Homes with pets or long hair
product.category: Home & Garden Bath Bathroom Accessories Drain Stoppers & Strainers

product.name: Electric Portable Powered Drill Pump Oil Fluid Water Transfer Pumps Self Priming
product.description: Key Features Drill Powered Design – Connects to most electric drills for fast pumping Self Priming Function – Smooth operation without manual priming Multi-Fluid Compatibility – Works with water, oil, diesel, and more Durable Construction – Built for long-lasting use Portable & Lightweight – Easy to carry and store Standard Hose Fit – Compatible with common hose sizes 📊 Technical Specifications Type: Drill Pump (Self Priming) Power Source: Electric Drill (not included) Material: High-strength plastic + metal shaft Flow Rate: Approx. 20–30 L/min Inlet/Outlet: Approx. 16mm Fluids: Water, oil, diesel, non-corrosive liquids ✅ Benefits Saves time compared to manual transfer No electricity needed—use your drill Reduces mess with controlled flow Ideal for emergencies and everyday tasks 🎯 Ideal For Homeowners and DIY users Garden irrigation tasks Automotive fluid changes Aquariums, pools, and tanks Workshops and construction sites 🌍 Vast Applications of Usage Automotive – oil, coolant, and fuel transfer Home – draining water and tanks Gardening – irrigation and water transfer Aquariums – tank cleaning and water changes Pools & spas – draining and refilling Workshops – handling light oils and fluids Marine – boat water removal and fuel transfer Construction – removing water from work areas 📦 Package Includes 1 × Electric Portable Drill Pump

Portable 40pcs Capacity Disc CD DVD VCD Wallet Storage Organizer Case Holder

product.name: Strong Vacuum Suction Cup Hook Shower Towel-Holder Hooks for Bathroom Kitchen UK
product.description:
🔥 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Organise your space easily with these Vacuum Suction Cup Hooks, designed to provide a strong hold without drilling or damaging your walls. Made from premium 304 stainless steel, these hooks are perfect for bathrooms, kitchens, and home organisation.
With powerful suction grip and a modern design, they securely hold towels, bags, and accessories on smooth surfaces while keeping your space neat and clutter-free.
⭐ KEY FEATURES ✅ No Drilling Required – Easy installation without tools or wall damage ✅ Strong Suction Power – Holds up to approx. 15 lbs (6.8 kg) ✅ Waterproof & Rustproof – Ideal for bathroom and kitchen use ✅ Durable Stainless Steel – Corrosion-resistant and long-lasting ✅ Modern Design – Matches any home décor style ✅ Reusable & Removable – Easy to reposition without marks ✅ Anti-Slip Hook – Secure grip for hanging items safely 📋 PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Product Type Suction Cup Hook Material 304 Stainless Steel Installation Vacuum Suction (No Drill) Load Capacity Up to 15 lbs (approx.) Colour Options Silver, Black, Gold, White Use Bathroom, Kitchen, Home Organisation 🎯 IDEAL FOR ✔ Towels & bath accessories ✔ Kitchen utensils ✔ Handbags & keys ✔ Clothes & hats ✔ Shower accessories 📦 PACKAGE OPTIONS ✔ 1 × Hook ✔ 2 × Hooks (Value Pack) ⚠️ INSTALLATION TIPS Suitable for smooth surfaces only (tiles, glass, metal, wood) Not suitable for painted or rough walls Press firmly and wait 24 hours before use 🔥 MULTI-BUY OFFERS 💰 Buy More Save More 💰 Quantity discounts available Check offer section above for latest deals
product.category: Home & Garden Household Accessories & Supplies Storage Solutions Wall Hooks & Door Hangers

product.name: Mens Body Shaper Compression Vest Slimming Shirt Tank Chest Belly Men's Waist UK
product.description:
🔥 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Achieve a more confident look instantly with this Men’s Slimming Compression Vest, designed to shape your chest, flatten your stomach, and support better posture. Made from a breathable stretch fabric, this vest provides firm compression while remaining comfortable for all-day wear.
Perfect for daily wear, gym workouts, or under clothing for a slimmer appearance. Lightweight, flexible, and discreet under shirts for everyday confidence.
⭐ KEY FEATURES ✅ Instant Slimming Effect – Flattens belly and shapes chest ✅ Compression Fit Design – Supports posture and core ✅ Breathable Fabric – Comfortable for all-day wear ✅ Seamless Under Clothing – Invisible under shirts ✅ High Elastic Material – Flexible body-contouring fit ✅ Lightweight & Comfortable – Ideal for daily or sports use ✅ Multi-Purpose Wear – Gym, running, work, or casual wear 📋 PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Product Type Men’s Compression Vest / Body Shaper Material Polyester Fabric Type Breathable Stretch Style Sleeveless Vest Fit Slim Compression Fit Colours Black, White Sizes M, L, XL, XXL Pattern Solid Care Machine Washable Condition New 📌 SIZE TIP Choose one size up for a more comfortable fit.
🎯 IDEAL FOR ✔ Daily wear under shirts ✔ Gym & fitness training ✔ Running, cycling, workouts ✔ Body shaping & posture support ✔ Confidence boosting appearance 📦 PACKAGE INCLUDES ✔ 1 × Men’s Compression Vest 🔥 MULTI-BUY OFFERS 💰 Buy More Save More 💰 Quantity discounts available Check offers above for the latest deals
product.category: Fashion Men Men's Clothing Underwear

product.name: 5 Pack Womens Sexy Knickers Underwear Ladies Lace Panties Seamless Briefs Pants
product.description:
🔥 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Refresh your essentials with this 5 Pack Women’s Cotton Lace Briefs Set, designed for everyday comfort with a stylish feminine touch. Made from a soft cotton-rich stretch fabric, these knickers offer breathable comfort, flexible fit, and delicate lace trim.
Perfect for daily wear, work, travel, or casual comfort, these briefs combine practicality with elegant style while providing a smooth and comfortable fit under clothing.
⭐ KEY FEATURES ✅ 5 Pack Value Set – Includes 5 assorted colours/styles ✅ Soft Cotton Rich Fabric – Comfortable and breathable feel ✅ 100% Cotton Crotch Lining – Extra freshness and hygiene ✅ Low Waist Design – Modern flattering fit ✅ Stretch Material – Flexible comfort for all-day wear ✅ Lace Trim Finish – Elegant, feminine detail ✅ Lightweight & Breathable – Ideal for everyday use ✅ Comfort Fit Brief Style – Smooth under clothing 🎨 COLOUR OPTIONS 🌈 Mixed Colour Packs Available
📌 Due to monitor and lighting differences, actual colours may vary slightly from images.
📋 PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Product Type Women’s Knickers / Briefs Style Low Waist Briefs Material 95% Cotton / 5% Spandex Crotch Fabric 100% Cotton Decoration Lace Trim Pattern Solid Colours Fit Regular Stretch Fit Sizes Available M, L, XL Quantity 5 Pieces Set 📏 SIZE GUIDE 📌 Asian sizing may run smaller than UK/EU sizes. Please consider choosing one size up for best comfort.
M – Suitable for Small L – Suitable for Medium XL – Suitable for Large 📦 PACKAGE INCLUDES ✔ 5 × Women’s Cotton Lace Briefs (Mixed / Selected Colours) 🎯 PERFECT FOR ✔ Everyday wear ✔ Work & office use ✔ Travel ✔ Comfortable daily essentials ✔ Gift idea 🔥 MULTI-BUY OFFERS 💰 Buy More Save More 💰 Quantity discounts available Check offer section above for latest deals

product.name: Laptop Sleeve Case NoteBook Pouch Bag for Macbook Air Pro 11" 13" 14" 15" UK
product.description:
🔥 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Keep your laptop safe and stylish with this Black Laptop Sleeve Bag, designed for everyday protection and portability. Suitable for many popular laptop brands including Lenovo, Dell, HP, Xiaomi, Asus, Acer, MacBook Air & MacBook Pro.
Featuring a soft padded interior, secure zip closure, and slim lightweight design, this laptop case is ideal for work, travel, school, commuting, or daily use.
⭐ KEY FEATURES ✅ Multi-Size Options Available – Fits 11", 13", 14", 15", 15.6" laptops ✅ Protective Padded Design – Helps protect against scratches and bumps ✅ Smooth Zip Closure – Secure and easy access ✅ Slim Lightweight Sleeve – Easy to carry alone or inside backpack ✅ Soft Interior Lining – Gentle on laptop surfaces ✅ Classic Black Colour – Professional modern look ✅ Unisex Design – Suitable for men and women ✅ Perfect for Travel & Work – Great for office, college, commuting 📋 PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Product Type Laptop Sleeve / Carry Case Colour Multi Material Cotton / Soft Fabric Closure Type Zipper Style Slim Sleeve Case Gender Unisex Pattern Solid 📏 INTERNAL SIZE GUIDE 📌 Please ensure your laptop dimensions are smaller than internal measurements.
11 / 12 Inch: 300 × 205 × 20 mm 13 Inch: 320 × 235 × 20 mm 14 / 15 Inch: 340 × 250 × 20 mm 15.6 Inch: 360 × 280 × 20 mm 💻 COMPATIBLE WITH ✔ MacBook Air / Pro ✔ Lenovo Laptops ✔ Dell Notebooks ✔ HP Laptops ✔ Xiaomi Notebooks ✔ Asus / Acer / Many Others 📦 PACKAGE INCLUDES ✔ 1 × Black Laptop Sleeve Bag 🔥 MULTI-BUY OFFERS 💰 Buy More Save More 💰 Quantity discounts available Check offer section above for latest deals
product.category: Electronics Computers/Tablets & Networking Laptop & Desktop Accessories Laptop Cases & Bags

product.name: Push to Open System Damper Buffer Cabinet Drawer Hinge Heavier Catch Heavy Duty
product.description:
🔥 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Upgrade your cabinets and drawers with this Push to Open Magnetic Catch Set. Simply press the door to latch or unlatch – no handles or knobs required. Creates a clean, seamless, modern look for your kitchen, wardrobe, or furniture.
Built-in magnet ensures a secure, tight close, preventing doors from drifting open. The adjustable 1/4" stroke makes installation easy and forgiving.
⭐ KEY FEATURES 🔹 Push to Open Design – One-touch open/close, no knobs or handles needed 🔹 Magnetic Holding Force – Keeps doors tightly closed, prevents drifting 🔹 Adjustable Stroke (1/4 inch) – Easier installation with alignment tolerance 🔹 Soft Closer Rebound – Smooth, quiet operation 🔹 Universal Fit – Works for cabinets, drawers, wardrobes, cupboards, and furniture doors 🔹 Durable Construction – High-quality materials for long-lasting use 🔹 Multiple Quantities – Choose from 3, 5, or 10 pieces per set 📋 PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Product Type Push to Open Magnetic Catch / Damper Function Push-to-open & soft close rebound Magnetic Force Built-in magnet for secure closing Adjustable Stroke Approx. 1/4 inch (6-7mm) Application Cabinet doors, drawers, wardrobes, cupboards, furniture Colour As shown in pictures (typically silver/black/white – check your variant) Size As shown in pictures (standard cabinet catch size) Package Options 3pcs, 5pcs, or 10pcs per set
product.category:
Home & Garden
DIY Materials Cabinet Hardware Cabinet Catches & Latches

product.name: Portable Zipper Eye Glasses Hard Case Sunglass Reading Cover Box Protector Gift
product.description:
🔥 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Keep your glasses safe and stylish with this Fashion Denim Fabric Glasses Case. Made from high-quality cotton denim, this soft-shell case features a smooth zipper closure and a trendy patchwork pattern. Perfect for sunglasses, reading glasses, or prescription eyewear.
The lightweight yet protective design prevents scratches, dust, and damage while you're on the go. A must-have accessory for anyone who wants to keep their glasses organized and protected.
⭐ KEY FEATURES 🔹 Premium Denim Fabric – High-quality cotton, soft yet durable 🔹 Zipper Closure – Secure, smooth-gliding zipper keeps glasses safely inside 🔹 Scratch Protection – Soft interior lining prevents lens scratches 🔹 Fashion Patchwork Design – Trendy and unisex style for men and women 🔹 Universal Size – Fits most sunglasses, reading glasses, and prescription eyewear 🔹 Lightweight & Portable – Easy to carry in purse, backpack, or pocket 🔹 Great Gift Idea – Perfect for glasses wearers, travelers, or fashion lovers 📋 PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Product Type Soft Shell Eyeglasses Case / Sunglasses Pouch Material Denim Fabric (Cotton) – No high-concerned chemicals Closure Zipper Pattern Type Patchwork Dimensions (approx.) Length: 16cm (6.3″), Width: 6cm (2.4″), Height: 3.5cm (1.4″) Weight Approx. 106g (3.7 oz) Gender Unisex Brand UNBRANDED Origin China Package Included 1 × Eyeglasses Box / Case
product.category: Health & Beauty Vision Care Glasses Cases & Storage

product.name: 2X Clay Bar Cloth Clay Cloth Washing Towel For Car Paint Detailing Cleaning UK
product.description:
🔥 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Transform your car detailing routine with this Magic Clay Towel. Unlike traditional clay bars, this dual-sided cleaning cloth covers a wider area and cleans faster – using only clean water or foam. The microfiber side lifts dirt while the clay side removes bonded contaminants like oxidation, water spots, ferrous powder, light rust, brake dust, and bird droppings.
Save up to 70% of your detailing time. Reusable multiple times – simply rinse with water and store in a cool, dry place. Will not damage your car's paint or shine.
⭐ KEY FEATURES 🔹 Only Requires Clean Water – No soaps or chemicals needed for most jobs 🔹 Dual-Sided Design – Microfiber side for general wiping, clay side for stubborn contamination 🔹 Removes Tough Stains – Heavy oxidation, rainwater stains, ferrous powder, light rust, brake dust,etc 🔹 Wider Coverage – Cleans a larger area faster than a traditional clay bar 🔹 Saves 70% Time & Effort – Complete car detailing in as little as 10 minutes 🔹 Reusable Multiple Times – Rinse with water after use – won't melt or deteriorate 📋 PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Product Type Magic Clay Towel / Car Decontamination Cloth Special Features Car cleaning – removes oxidation, water spots, brake dust, bird droppings Material Microfiber + Polymer clay composite Model Options Fine clay towel (gentle) / Medium clay towel (more aggressive) Colour Blue Size Approx. 30 × 30 cm (11.81 × 11.81 inches) Weight Approx. 130g (4.6 oz) Package Included 1 × Clay Towel
product.category:
Home & Garden
Household & Laundry Supplies Cleaning Tools Cleaning Towels & Cloths

product.name: Army Military Style Baseball Cadet Cap Hat Cadet Combat Fishing-Baseball-Cap UK
product.description:
🔥 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Step out in retro style with this Washed Denim Flat Top Hat. Inspired by vintage military and fishing caps, this hat features an old-wash jeans look, a firm flat top (bib style), and a comfortable fit for both men and women. The tatting weaving craft adds durability and texture, while the 360° brim offers excellent sun protection for outdoor adventures.
Perfect for fishing, hiking, gardening, travel, or daily casual wear. Designed to fit larger heads comfortably, with a unisex European-inspired silhouette.
⭐ KEY FEATURES 🔹 Retro Washed Denim Look – Old wash jeans style with a vintage, casual vibe 🔹 Flat Top (Bib) Design – Classic military/fishing hat silhouette – holds its shape 🔹 Sun Protection – Full brim helps shield face and neck from UV rays 🔹 Tatting Weaving Craft – Durable, textured fabric for long-lasting wear 🔹 Unisex & Big Head Friendly – Comfortable fit for men and women, accommodates larger head sizes 🔹 Four Seasons Use – Breathable cotton/polyester blend suitable for spring, summer, autumn, winter 🔹 European Trend Style – Fashion-forward accessory for outdoor or city wear 🔹 Easy Care – Do not machine wash, bleach, or iron – spot clean only 📋 PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Item Type Military Style Hat / Flat Top Cap / Fishing Hat Material Cotton / Polyester blend (as per style) Craft of Weaving Tatting Feature Sun protection Applicable Scene Outdoor, casual, fishing, travel, daily wear Applicable Season Four seasons (spring, summer, autumn, winter) Gender Men (unisex – also fits women) Department Name Adult unisex Colour Multicolored (washed denim effect – as pictured) Style Casual, Retro, European Trend Size (approx.) 28 × 18 × 11 cm (11″ × 7″ × 4.3″) Number of pieces 1 hat Care Instructions Do not machine wash / Do not bleach / Do not iron – spot clean only
product.category: Fashion Men Men's Accessories Hats

product.name: Heavy Duty Waterproof Garden Patio Furniture Cover for Rattan Table Cube Outdoor
product.description:
🔥 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Protect your outdoor furniture from sun, rain, dust, and dirt with this High-Quality Outdoor Furniture Cover. Crafted from durable polyester and cotton, this cover offers reliable UV protection and weather resistance, keeping your terrace, garden chairs, and tables looking like new.
Available in over 200 sizes – find the perfect fit for your garden furniture. The modern, sleek design adds a touch of elegance to your outdoor space while providing heavy-duty protection.
⭐ KEY FEATURES 🔹 UV Protection – Shields furniture from harmful sun rays, preventing fading and cracking 🔹 Dust Barrier – Keeps outdoor furniture clean and ready to use at any moment 🔹 Water-Resistant Material – Polyester/cotton blend repels light rain and moisture 🔹 Customizable Fit – Available in over 200 sizes (see full list below) 🔹 Modern Style – Sleek, elegant design complements any terrace or garden 🔹 Durable Construction – Crafted for longevity and resistance to weather elements 📋 PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Product Type Outdoor Furniture Cover – Garden Chair/Table Protector Material Polyester / Cotton blend Features UV, dust, water-resistant (light rain) Status Eco-friendly Style Modern, sleek, elegant Available Sizes 200+ options (see dropdown/variations) Colour As pictured 📏 AVAILABLE SIZES (SELECT YOUR FIT) Choose from the following dimensions (Length × Width × Height in cm):
40×40×40 80×80×80 85×85×80 90×90×90 68×68×120 110×110×70 120×90×76 120×120×74 120×120×140 120×60×90 120×95×75 123×123×74 123×61×72 126×126×74 130×70×70 130×130×75 135×135×75 140×140×140 140×90×60 145×85×80 145×90×105 150×150×75 152×104×71 154×90×76 155×95×68 160×160×80 170×94×70 180×120×74 180×150×80 190×125×80 190×66×89 200×160×70 200×160×80 200×200×120 200×200×85 205×90×60
product.category: Home & Garden Garden & Patio Garden & Patio Furniture Outdoor Furniture Covers

product.name: Womens Magic High Waist Slimming Underwear Knickers Briefs Firm Tummy Control UK
product.description:
🔥 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Achieve a smooth, sculpted silhouette with these Seamless High Waist Shaping Panties. Designed for all-day comfort, they offer tummy control, butt lifting, and a breathable fit – perfect for daily wear, postpartum recovery, or special occasions. The seamless knit construction prevents visible panty lines, while the nylon/elastane blend moves with your body.
Antibacterial and moisture-absorbing fabric keeps you fresh, and the high-waist design provides gentle compression without discomfort. Available in multiple sizes from XS to 4XL.
⭐ KEY FEATURES 🔹 High Waist Tummy Control – Firm but gentle shaping for a flatter stomach 🔹 Butt Lifter Design – Lifts and shapes your peach buttock naturally 🔹 Seamless Knit Fabric – No visible panty lines under tight clothing 🔹 Breathable & Comfortable – Nylon/elastane blend for all-day wear 🔹 Antibacterial + Moisture-Absorbing – Keeps you dry and fresh 🔹 Maternity & Postpartum Friendly – Gentle support for new mums 🔹 Easy to Wash – Machine washable, durable fabric 🔹 Multiple Sizes – XS-S, M-L, XL-XXL, 3XL, 4XL (see size chart) 📋 PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Item Type High Waist Shaping Panties / Body Shaper Material Nylon + Elastane (knitted, seamless) Colour --- Abdominal Support Yes – high waist compression Butt Lifting Yes – shapes the peach buttock Special Features Antibacterial, moisture-absorbing, seamless, breathable Season All seasons Gender Women / Maternity Age Range 12+ years, maternity Model Number 1102
product.category:
Fashion
Women's Clothing Lingerie & Nightwear Shapewear
